NCTU 04 + NCTU 05 [Contract concerning dates and vats of broken commodity][via hbtin]

o 1o 1

md60—NUMUN-MU DUMU ša₂ md60—DUMU—MUnu ina ḫu-ud ⸢lib₃⸣-[bi-šu₂]

o 22

a-na m⸢tat⸣-tan-nu DUMU ša₂ md60—DINiṭ A mlu-uš-tam-⸢mar-d⸣[IŠKUR]
